title: Fix reported issues in ReportTask, S3 similarity semantics, cache bounds, and debug script

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started verification of reported bugs; confirmed references in ReportTask.tsx, check_report.py, s3vectors_client.py, opensearch_client.py, and feedback_utils cache implementation. Applying fixes now.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Validation: .venv/bin/pytest -q plexus/analysis/s3vectors_client_test.py plexus/reports/blocks/feedback_utils_test.py -> 20 passed in 5.66s. Added coverage for S3 similarity/threshold ordering and cache-capacity eviction behavior.
